{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Spoils of war
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Spoils of war]] are worth a minimum of 10 points, subject to appraisal.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
